nodes.name: Fetch Swipe Reference
nodes.notes: Fetch the swipe that serves as the visual style reference. Its recreation_prompt + image_url are used for NanoBanana.

nodes.name: Prepare Prompts
nodes.notes: Constructs a NanoBanana prompt for each variant, combining the swipe's recreation_prompt + brand colors + copy text.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Process variants one at a time to avoid rate limits on NanoBanana API.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: $json.prompt, width: $json.width, height: $json.height, reference_image: $json.reference_image_url || undefined, num_images: 1 }) }}

nodes.name: NanoBanana: Generate Image
nodes.notes: TODO: Replace URL and auth with actual NanoBanana API endpoint. Sends prompt + optional reference image for style-matched generation.

nodes.name: Prepare Creative Payload
nodes.notes: Builds context payload for creatives table. Calculates week_number and hook_number. Runs once per variant inside the Split In Batches loop.

nodes.name: Find Batch
nodes.notes: Look up the weekly batch for this client. Returns empty array if it doesn't exist yet.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Prepare Creative Payload').item.json.client_id, week_number: $('Prepare Creative Payload').item.json.week_number, year: $('Prepare Creative Payload').item.json.year, status: 'in_production' }) }}

nodes.name: Create Batch
nodes.notes: Insert new batch row if none exists for this client/week/year.

nodes.name: Merge Batch ID
nodes.notes: Combines both IF branches. Attaches batch_id to the creative payload.

nodes.name: Find Concept
nodes.notes: Look up the concept for this batch+angle+format. Returns empty array if it doesn't exist yet.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_id: $('Merge Batch ID').item.json.batch_id, client_id: $('Merge Batch ID').item.json.client_id, angle: $('Merge Batch ID').item.json.angle, format: $('Merge Batch ID').item.json.format, awareness_level: $('Merge Batch ID').item.json.awareness_level, status: 'in_production' }) }}

nodes.name: Create Concept
nodes.notes: Insert new concept row if none exists for this batch/angle/format.

nodes.name: Merge Concept ID
nodes.notes: Combines both IF branches. Attaches concept_id to the creative payload.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ concept_id: $json.concept_id, client_id: $json.client_id, hook_number: $json.hook_number, body_number: $json.body_number, hook_text: ($json.variant && $json.variant.headline) || '', body_text: ($json.variant && $json.variant.body_copy) || '', cta_text: ($json.variant && $json.variant.cta) || '', awareness_level: $json.awareness_level, image_url: $json.image_url, format: $json.format, production_status: 'rendered' }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Creative
nodes.notes: Inserts the creative row. The Postgres trigger auto-generates the name field (e.g. CLIENT-W14-H1B1).
